name: Lungyen Life Service Corporation
summary: Lungyen Life Service Corporation provides funeral services in Taiwan. It is also involved in the development and lease of interment premises; sale and rental of residence and business buildings; invests in securities; provision of architecture and civil engineering services; and sale of cremated remains storage facilities. The company was formerly known as Dahan Development Corp. Lungyen Life Service Corporation was founded in 1987 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
